name: bioethics_mutual_aid_request_conflicts_lumen_tru_loy
premise: A Bioethics ethics consult line is in a fast-moving incident involving bioethics mutual aid request conflicts lumen tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases consent, harm minimization, and precedent. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Ravi Berg
agents.identity: I am Ravi Berg, accountable for a defensible call in Bioethics when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Fatima Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Fatima Ibrahim, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Bioethics.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Ravi Berg must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Ravi Berg do?
